---
title: "Concepts"
subtitle: "The objects and contracts behind extraction."
sidebar: concepts
---

Start with the object you hold, then move to the system that plans how to create it:

- [Stimuli](stimuli.qmd)
- [Feature objects](feature-objects.qmd)
- [Unified workflow](unified-workflow.qmd)
- [Catalogue and planning](catalog-and-planning.qmd)
- [Feature catalogue](feature-catalogue.qmd)
- [Execution modes](execution-modes.qmd)
- [Recipes and DAGs](recipes-and-dags.qmd)
- [Table interchange](table-interchange.qmd)
- [Native time and clocks](native-time-and-clocks.qmd)
- [fMRI windowing](fmri-windowing.qmd)
- [Audio batch workflows](audio-batch-workflows.qmd)
